opportunities.title: Senior Principal, MLE — AI Governance
opportunities.description: Establish, operationalize, and continuously improve the enterprise-wide governance framework for AI, ML, and advanced analytics. Reports directly to the Chief Data Scientist & AI Officer. Partners with AI, Product, Data Engineering, Security, Compliance, and Legal teams to define and enforce governance standards for responsible AI innovation.

opportunities.title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
opportunities.description: World's largest technical AI conference — 250+ speakers, 20+ tracks, 6,000+ attendees including VPs of AI, founders, and AI engineers. Tracks include governance, safety, and enterprise AI. Strong networking floor at Moscone West.

opportunities.title: WISP: AI for Next-Gen SOC Summit (Virtual)
opportunities.description: Virtual summit focused on AI applications in security operations. Free with WISP code. Good opportunity to reconnect with the WISP community ahead of in-person events.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers SF — Monthly Meetup
opportunities.description: Monthly SF meetup for AI practitioners and builders. Next event: Offensive Security Demo Night, June 25. Regularly attended by senior practitioners across ML, AI safety, and applied research.
